description_long: This rifle features a bold, industrial design with a predominantly black and orange color scheme, accented by metallic copper and gold elements. The body is robust and angular, with the phrase 'MIND THE STEP' prominently displayed along the top rail in orange lettering. The front end is squared off with a large, blocky muzzle, while the rear includes a geometric stock and a compact sighting device mounted on top. Several cylindrical components and exposed mechanical details are visible along the underside, suggesting a high-tech or futuristic function. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and composite materials, giving it a sturdy and tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A futuristic black and orange rifle with bold lettering, angular bodywork, and metallic accents, featuring a compact sight and blocky muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, 'MIND THE STEP' text, and detailed mechanical components underneath.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the square muzzle and the alignment of the sighting device above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with visible text and mechanical details, but less emphasis on the sight.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full 'MIND THE STEP' text, sight placement, and the geometric design of the stock and muzzle.
